channel.title: GitHub Swift Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Swift in GitHub

item.title: utmapp/UTM
item.description: Virtual machines for iOS and macOS

item.title: exelban/stats
item.description: macOS system monitor in your menu bar

item.title: whoeevee/EeveeSpotify
item.description: A tweak to get Spotify Premium for free, just like Spotilife

item.title: pointfreeco/swift-composable-architecture
item.description: A library for building applications in a consistent and understandable way, with composition, testing, and ergonomics in mind.

item.title: khanhduytran0/LiveContainer
item.description: Run iOS app without actually installing it!

item.title: apple/swift-collections
item.description: Commonly used data structures for Swift

item.title: onevcat/Kingfisher
item.description: A lightweight, pure-Swift library for downloading and caching images from the web.

item.title: nikitabobko/AeroSpace
item.description: AeroSpace is an i3-like tiling window manager for macOS

item.title: ninxsoft/Mist
item.description: A Mac utility that automatically downloads macOS Firmwares / Installers.

item.title: airbnb/lottie-ios
item.description: An iOS library to natively render After Effects vector animations

item.title: sindresorhus/Defaults
item.description: 💾 Swifty and modern UserDefaults

item.title: lihaoyun6/QuickRecorder
item.description: A lightweight screen recorder based on ScreenCapture Kit for macOS / 基于 ScreenCapture Kit 的轻量化多功能 macOS 录屏工具

item.title: swiftlang/swift-syntax
item.description: A set of Swift libraries for parsing, inspecting, generating, and transforming Swift source code.

item.title: apple/swift-algorithms
item.description: Commonly used sequence and collection algorithms for Swift

item.title: jacklandrin/OnlySwitch
item.description: ⚙️ All-in-One menu bar app, hide 💻MacBook Pro's notch, dark mode, AirPods, Shortcuts

item.title: lwouis/alt-tab-macos
item.description: Windows alt-tab on macOS

item.title: ChartsOrg/Charts
item.description: Beautiful charts for iOS/tvOS/OSX! The Apple side of the crossplatform MPAndroidChart.

item.title: vapor/vapor
item.description: 💧 A server-side Swift HTTP web framework.

item.title: Whisky-App/Whisky
item.description: A modern Wine wrapper for macOS built with SwiftUI

item.title: SwifterSwift/SwifterSwift
item.description: A handy collection of more than 500 native Swift extensions to boost your productivity.

item.title: mapbox/mapbox-maps-ios
item.description: Interactive, thoroughly customizable maps for iOS powered by vector tiles and Metal
